series_metadata.series_description: The Board is required by statute Section 4757.101 of the Revised Code to obtain criminal records checks from BCI&I and FBI for new licensees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: After one year or sooner if no further use for the reports, they shall be destroyed by securely shredded means. ; Electronic: After one year or sooner if no further use for the reports, they shall be deleted from the Board''s electronic files., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
